title: NGC 539
summary: NGC 539 is a barred spiral galaxy in the constellation of Cetus south. It is estimated to be 429 million light years from the Milky Way and has a diameter of approximately 286,000 ly. It was discovered on 31 October 1885 by American astronomer Francis Leavenworth.
